title: Russia’s Deadly Attack on Ukraine Reminds Europe of Its Own Vulnerabilities
summary_full: Governments across the continent have increased military spending, but the strikes are another warning that they need to be prepared if the conflict crosses into NATO territory.
summary_public: Governments across the continent have increased military spending, but the strikes are another warning that they need to be prepared if the conflict crosses into NATO territory.
